## PreselectedFilters class

This component emits [FacetsXEvents.PreselectedFiltersProvided](./x-components.facetsxevents.preselectedfiltersprovided.md) when a preselected filter is set in the snippet config or by using the prop of the component.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export default class PreselectedFilters extends Vue 
```
<b>Extends:</b> Vue

## Properties

|  Property | Modifiers | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  [filters](./x-components.preselectedfilters.filters.md) |  | string\[\] | A list of filters to preselect. |

## Methods

|  Method | Modifiers | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  [created()](./x-components.preselectedfilters.created.md) |  | Emits the provided preselected filters prioritizing the [SnippetConfig](./x-components.snippetconfig.md) over the filters prop. |
|  [render()](./x-components.preselectedfilters.render.md) |  |  |
